awesomeList.description: an awesome list of honeypot resources

nodes.itemHTML: • awesome-pcaptoolsstars2.2k - Useful in network traffic analysis.
• awesome-malware-analysisstars7.5k - Some overlap here for artifact analysis.

• Research Papers
    • Honeypot research papersstars11 - PDFs of research papers on honeypots.
    • vEYE - Behavioral footprinting for self-propagating worm detection and profiling.

• Deployment
    • Dionaea and EC2 in 20 Minutes - Tutorial on setting up Dionaea on an EC2 instance.
    • Using a Raspberry Pi honeypot to contribute data to DShield/ISC - The Raspberry Pi based system will allow us to maintain one code base that will make it easier to collect rich logs beyond firewall logs.
    • honeypotpistars28 - Script for turning a Raspberry Pi into a HoneyPot Pi.
• Honeypot (Dionaea and kippo) setup scriptstars77

• Front Ends
    • DionaeaFRstars60 - Front Web to Dionaea low-interaction honeypot.
    • Django-kippostars11 - Django App for kippo SSH Honeypot.
    • Shockpot-Frontendstars2 - Full featured script to visualize statistics from a Shockpot honeypot.
    • Tangostars243 - Honeypot Intelligence with Splunk.
    • Wordpot-Frontendstars3 - Full featured script to visualize statistics from a Wordpot honeypot.
    • honeyalarmg2stars3 - Simplified UI for showing honeypot alarms.
    • honeypotDisplaystars2 - Flask website which displays data gathered from an SSH Honeypot.

• A script to visualize statistics from honeyd
    • Honeyd-Viz

• Sandbox
    • Argos - Emulator for capturing zero-day attacks.
    • COMODO automated sandbox
    • Cuckoo - Leading open source automated malware analysis system.
    • Pylibemustars109 - Libemu Cython wrapper.
    • RFISandbox - PHP 5.x script sandbox built on top of funcall.
    • dorothy2stars196 - Malware/botnet analysis framework written in Ruby.
    • imalsestars12 - Integrated MALware Simulator and Emulator.
    • libemustars83 - Shellcode emulation library, useful for shellcode detection.

• Sandbox-as-a-Service
    • Hybrid Analysis - Free malware analysis service powered by Payload Security that detects and analyzes unknown threats using a unique Hybrid Analysis technology.
    • Joebox Cloud - Analyzes the behavior of malicious files including PEs, PDFs, DOCs, PPTs, XLSs, APKs, URLs and MachOs on Windows, Android and Mac OS X for suspicious activities.
    • VirusTotal - Analyze suspicious files and URLs to detect types of malware, and automatically share them with the security community.
    • malwr.com - Free malware analysis service and community.

• Visualization
    • Acapulcostars11 - Automated Attack Community Graph Construction.
    • Afterglow Cloudstars16
    • Afterglow
    • Glastopf Analyticsstars0 - Easy honeypot statistics.
    • HoneyMaltstars15 - Maltego tranforms for mapping Honeypot systems.
    • HoneyMapstars208 - Real-time websocket stream of GPS events on a fancy SVG world map.
    • HoneyStats - Statistical view of the recorded activity on a Honeynet.
    • HpfeedsHoneyGraphstars14 - Visualization app to visualize hpfeeds logs.
    • Kippo statsstars20 - Mojolicious app to display statistics for your kippo SSH honeypot.
    • Kippo-Graph - Full featured script to visualize statistics from a Kippo SSH honeypot.
    • The Intelligent HoneyNetstars55 - Create actionable information from honeypots.
    • ovizartstars46 - Visual analysis for network traffic.

• Database Honeypots
    • Delilahstars10 - Elasticsearch Honeypot written in Python (originally from Novetta).
    • ESPotstars20 - Elasticsearch honeypot written in NodeJS, to capture every attempts to exploit CVE-2014-3120.
    • Elastic honeystars164 - Simple Elasticsearch Honeypot.
    • MongoDB-HoneyProxystars73 - MongoDB honeypot proxy.
    • NoSQLpotstars100 - Honeypot framework built on a NoSQL-style database.
    • mysql-honeypotdstars12 - Low interaction MySQL honeypot written in C.
    • MysqlPotstars21 - MySQL honeypot, still very early stage.
    • pghoneystars8 - Low-interaction Postgres Honeypot.
    • sticky_elephantstars6 - Medium interaction postgresql honeypot.

• Web honeypots
    • EoHoneypotBundlestars30 - Honeypot type for Symfony2 forms.
    • Glastopfstars445 - Web Application Honeypot.
    • Google Hack Honeypot - Designed to provide reconnaissance against attackers that use search engines as a hacking tool against your resources.
    • Laravel Application Honeypotstars409 - Simple spam prevention package for Laravel applications.
    • Nodepotstars34 - NodeJS web application honeypot.
    • Servletpotstars12 - Web application Honeypot.
    • Shadow Daemon - Modular Web Application Firewall / High-Interaction Honeypot for PHP, Perl, and Python apps.
    • StrutsHoneypotstars67 - Struts Apache 2 based honeypot as well as a detection module for Apache 2 servers.
    • WebTrapstars43 - Designed to create deceptive webpages to deceive and redirect attackers away from real websites.
    • basic-auth-pot (bap)stars26 - HTTP Basic Authentication honeypot.
    • bwpotstars23 - Breakable Web applications honeyPot.
    • django-admin-honeypotstars782 - Fake Django admin login screen to notify admins of attempted unauthorized access.
    • drupostars53 - Drupal Honeypot.
    • honeyhttpdstars13 - Python-based web server honeypot builder.
    • phpmyadmin_honeypotstars59 - Simple and effective phpMyAdmin honeypot.
    • shockpotstars52 - WebApp Honeypot for detecting Shell Shock exploit attempts.
    • smart-honeypotstars15 - PHP Script demonstrating a smart honey pot.
    • Snare/Tanner - successors to Glastopf
      • Snarestars320 - Super Next generation Advanced Reactive honeypot.
      • Tannerstars143 - Evaluating SNARE events.
    • stack-honeypotstars23 - Inserts a trap for spam bots into responses.
    • tomcat-manager-honeypotstars7 - Honeypot that mimics Tomcat manager endpoints. Logs requests and saves attacker's WAR file for later study
    • WordPress honeypots
      • HonnyPotterstars24 - WordPress login honeypot for collection and analysis of failed login attempts.
      • HoneyPressstars0 - Python based WordPress honeypot in a Docker container.
      • wp-smart-honeypotstars26 - WordPress plugin to reduce comment spam with a smarter honeypot.
      • wordpotstars156 - WordPress Honeypot.

• Service Honeypots
    • ADBHoneystars125 - Low interaction honeypot that simulates an Android device running Android Debug Bridge (ADB) server process.
    • AMTHoneypotstars14 - Honeypot for Intel's AMT Firmware Vulnerability CVE-2017-5689.
